transcription.text: this is the wonderful filter flow washing system introduced and perfected by General Electric to give clean bright washes with no lint fuzz lint is caught for good here in this easy to reach easy to clean non-clogging filter no more linty socks like these instead clean and bright with no lint fuzz and with this new 1958 General Electric you get filter flow washing plus wash to order fabric keys you simply touch one key to give your wash load the just right combination of wash and spin speeds and water temperatures there is a clearly marked key for all your washables cottons synthetics and specials results everything clean and sparkling with no lint fuzz see this big capacity in the middle of the day and the best thing about this system is that it's easy to clean and have fun so please visit us at General Electric or Call us at 908-558-9500
